meta.description: High-signal items only: contracts, earnings, funding, IPO signals, defense awards, acquisitions. urgency: immediate=act now, same_day=review today, watch=monitor

immediate.title: Senate Committee Backs Multi-Year Deals for F-35, F-15EX
immediate.summary: The Air Force would be able to sign multiyear contracts to buy F-35A Joint Strike Fighters and F-15EX Eagle II jets under the Senate’s version of a key defense policy bill. The post Senate Committee Backs Multi-Year Deals for F-35, F-15EX appeared first on Air & Space Forces Magazine .

immediate.title: Senate NDAA backs plan to fold SDA, Space RCO into Space Force
immediate.summary: The committee's 2027 defense bill would eliminate separate statutory requirements for the two acquisition organizations while advancing broader Pentagon procurement reforms The post Senate NDAA backs plan to fold SDA, Space RCO into Space Force appeared first on SpaceNews .

Watch NASA’s live undocking coverage beginning at 11:45 a.m. EDT on NASA+, Amazon Prime, and the agency’s YouTube channel. []

immediate.title: GAO Report: Just Over One in Four F-35As Fully Mission Capable
immediate.summary: Software shortcomings, spare parts shortages, and corrosion problems mean only about one in four F-35 stealth fighters were ready to carry out all their possible missions at any given time in fiscal 2025, according to a new Government Accountability Office report. The post GAO Report: Just Over One in Four F-35As Fully Mission Capable appeared first on Air & Space Forces Magazine .

immediate.title: Lawmakers Eye Four-Star Command for Unmanned, Autonomous Systems
immediate.summary: The Pentagon could have the option to create a new combatant command devoted to unmanned and autonomous systems if a provision in the Senate Armed Services Committee’s annual defense policy bill becomes law. The legislation is one of several moves lawmakers have proposed in recent weeks to both bound and bolster the department’s use of artificial intelligence and AI-enabled weapons. The post Lawmakers Eye Four-Star Command for Unmanned, Autonomous Systems appeared first on Air & Space Forces Magazine .

immediate.title: James Webb Space Telescope discovers 'galaxy-killing' wind that may explain why some early galaxies lived fast and died young
immediate.summary: A “galaxy-killing” wind driven by cosmic mergers may explain why many massive galaxies in the early universe stopped forming stars far earlier than expected, according to new JWST and ALMA observations.

How Jules Verne predicted the Artemis 2 mission to the moon almost 160 years ago
immediate.summary: Written in the 1860s, Jules Verne’s novels "From the Earth to the Moon" and "All Around the Moon" were highly speculative fiction in their time, but tell a tale that now seems remarkably familiar: three astronauts in a conical capsule on a free-return trajectory around the moon.
